name: Chatpad AI
compose:
name: slashnode-chatpad-ai
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/deiucanta/chatpad:bb5f4abb36b45320df69dfccb64e734f36ca9bb3
    container_name: chatpad-ai
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:10102:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
